titleStmt.title: SII 29.15: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 15. (A.R. No. B. 825 of 1962-63.) NUGḌŌṆI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the field Known as Munnappana-hola.

It states that when queen Sōmaladēvi was camping at Poṭṭḷakeṟe, she made a grant of 20 mattar land, a garden of one mattar extent, a house site and a oil-mill for a perpetual lamp to the god Baṅkēśvara of Baḷḷaniṭṭige, a bhattagrāma (village) of Mosaḷikal-300 situated in the administrative division Eḍadoṟe-2000. The grant was made at the request of Jaychanḍariti Mārabbe, after worshipping Gōkarṇnarāsijīya. Perhaps Gōkarṇnarāsijīya received the grant made in favour of the god by the queen.

The grant seems to have been made on Pushya ba. Wednesday, uttarāyaṇa sankrānti was recorded on Māgha ba. Thursday in the cyclic year Yuva of Śaka 957. The first date may correspond with 24th December 1035 A.D., Wednesday and the second with 22 January 1036 A.D., [Kuṁbha sankramaṇa occured on this day but not mentioned in the record].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatsōmaladēviyar poṭṭaḷakeṟeya
nelevīḍinoḷ sakavarṣa 957 neya yuva saṁvatsa
rada puṣya bahuḷa budhavāradaṁndunuttarāyaṇa saṁ
krāntiya parvva nimittya puliyajīyarmasa
ndada gōkarṇnarāsi jīyargge hastōdakaṁ geydu ka
radu lekkavoḷa sammandadiṁ māgha bahuḷa bṛha
spativāradaṁdu jayacaṇḍariti mārabbeya A
(ṇa)tiya Eḍedoṟe 2000 ra doḷagaṇa mosaḷikalla
300 ṟa baḷiya bhattagrāme baḷḷaniṭṭigeya kasige
gaṇa baṁkēsvara dēvargge
diṁ sarvvanamasyaṁ biṭṭa nela mattarippatu tōṁṭa ma
ttaroṁdu nivēsana dēvargge Aḻda Ūroḷage gāṇa(vā)
(to)li Eṇne nandādīvige naḍavaṁnta ghaṇa 1 Stops here abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 29.15 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
